fields.title: Add extension to install script
fields.description:
## Task

Update the tau extension installer script to include agent-awareness.

## File: scripts/pi/install-extensions.sh

Add agent-awareness to the list of extensions to symlink into ~/.pi/agent/extensions/

## DoD

- Script updated to include agent-awareness
- Running ./scripts/pi/install-extensions.sh symlinks the new extension
- Extension is discoverable by pi after installation
fields.close_reason: No separate agent-awareness extension package after tau-i3c; ships inside extensions/tau so install script stays tau-only
